title: [Griffin's Keen, Switchbacks]
description: The trail ends here in a wide ledge, part of which is sheltered under a shallow overhang of snow-covered rock.  Back from the edge and obscured by the black and greys of ice and stone, a dark blotch marks the entrance to a wide-mouthed cave.

wayto.3993: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northwest'
